Explanation:
Interpreting “the something did not happen” as seasons where playoffs did not occur (indicated by “no playoff” or “champion (no playoff)” in the Playoffs column), the applicable rows are: 1, 2, 3, 5, 6, 7, 11, 12, 13, 14, 15, 16, 17, 18, 19, 21, 22, 23, 24, 25, 26, 27. That totals 22 seasons without playoffs. Therefore, the Prediction Answer of 22 is correct.
